description_long: This is an adult female figure with a slim build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top and straight-cut pants, both of which appear to be made from a smooth, fabric-like material. Her footwear consists of open-toed sandals with straps, and she wears a bracelet on her left wrist. The figure's hairstyle is a short, side-parted bob, neatly styled and tucked behind the ears. The facial features are soft and stylized, with a neutral expression. The overall appearance is casual yet modern, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a sleeveless top, pants, and sandals, standing in a T-pose with a short, side-parted bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeveless top, straight pants, sandals, and bracelet on the left wrist, with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted nature of the clothing, and the sandal straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hairstyle, the halter-style top, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm, side profile, and the sandal design.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-cut pants with a bracelet accessory
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
